title: B2 bridge answer architecture
subtitle: Build an answer with thesis, nuance, and conclusion.
overview: B2 answers need a clear line of thought, not just connected sentences.
Use a thesis, concession, evidence, and conclusion.

sections.title: Pattern
rows: That said, it is worth nuancing it.
Un dato que lo ilustra es...
A fact that illustrates this is...

items.es: Mi postura inicial es que la tecnología mejora el aprendizaje cuando se usa con criterio.
items.en: My initial position is that technology improves learning when it is used with judgment.

items.es: Ahora bien, conviene matizarlo porque no todas las herramientas sirven para todos.
items.en: That said, it is worth nuancing it because not all tools work for everyone.

items.es: Un ejemplo que lo ilustra es el uso de audio para mejorar la pronunciación.
items.en: An example that illustrates this is the use of audio to improve pronunciation.

items.es: Sin una rutina clara, la misma herramienta puede convertirse en distracción.
items.en: Without a clear routine, the same tool can become a distraction.

items.es: Por tanto, concluiría que la clave no es la tecnología, sino el método.
items.en: Therefore, I would conclude that the key is not technology, but the method.
